text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 126 

LTSS_PRVDR_ID_1 

LTSS_PRVDR_ID_2 

LTSS_PRVDR_ID_3 

LABEL: Long-Term Services and Supports Provider 1–3 Identification Number — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A unique identification number assigned by the state to the long-term care facility furnishing 
healthcare services to the beneficiary; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: LTSS_PRVDR_ID_1
